scores.correctness_notes: Core content is accurate: collect_app_status fires on leader only, collect_unit_status on all units, priority order is correct for usable statuses (blocked > maintenance > waiting > active), ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus forbidden, multiple handlers allowed. All key behaviours from gold standard are covered.
scores.hallucination_notes: Claims 'First wins among equals' (i.e. first BlockedStatus added wins if two are added) — this specific tie-breaking rule is not in the gold standard and may be fabricated. Also uses `self.config` instead of `self.model.config` in example code, which is a minor inaccuracy. Instance variables `_ready`/`_config_valid` used across hook invocations is architecturally misleading (charm instances don't persist between hooks) but not an API hallucination.
